The '''KR-TB "Doomtreader"''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] produced by [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]]. It had expansive cargo holds, heavy deflector shields and dual laser cannons, but came at a relatively high price.

==History==
[[Montross (bounty hunter)|Montross's]] ''[[Hell's Anvil]]'' was a modified KR-TB. One of [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolytes]], [[Tol Skorr]], also piloted a KR-TB. Montross's ship had solar ionization cannons that could go through [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]].

{{Ship-stub}}
